description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Until the tokens of a Prime Agent are Publicly Held, as defined in [A.2.

.5.2.3.1.1 - Publicly Held Definition](d6265f88-d2d0-457b-8958-a3c22f9a5718), the Root Edit Primitive will not be operational. Instead, if a Prime Agent wishes to edit its Agent Artifact, it must use the customary Atlas Edit Proposal processes specified in the Sky Core Atlas at [A.1.10.2 - Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle](14e99d92-71fc-44d9-9dbf-933bce2e1b32) or [A.1.11.2 - Atlas Edit Monthly Cycle](d2cbddd2-58ef-4311-a71d-d2c340364cb5). The process for Prime Agents to use the Atlas Edit Proposal process is further specified in [A.2.
.5.2.3.2 - Atlas Edit Proposal Process For Prime Agents](364e52eb-4529-46a9-9852-edaaab88baeb).

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
